series_metadata.series_description: Statewide post emancipation foster care program for young adults age 18 to 21. Includes application, voluntary participation agreement, provisional agreement, voluntary withdrawal, ineligibility, tier screening tool, denial, disability, critical incident, transition planning, and termination forms. Includes program documents such as educational, employment, court, medical, and disability records. Includes task completion checklists and case activity notes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Permanently in program area server. Permanently
